title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 216 Cumberland Street in Rochester, New York, as the "Minister Franklin Florence Memorial Post Office".
plain_summary: This bill renames a post office building in Rochester, New York to honor someone named Minister Franklin Florence. The post office is located at 216 Cumberland Street. After this bill becomes law, the building will be officially called the Minister Franklin Florence Memorial Post Office. All government papers and documents will have to use this new name when they talk about this post office.
last_action_text: Ordered to be Reported by the Yeas and Nays: 23 - 15.

sections.title: Section 1  Minister Franklin Florence Memorial Post Office
sections.text: The post office building owned by the United States Postal Service at two hundred sixteen Cumberland Street in Rochester, New York will now be called the Minister Franklin Florence Memorial Post Office. From now on, whenever any law, map, rule, document, paper, or other official record mentions this post office building, it must use the new name Minister Franklin Florence Memorial Post Office.
